treatment_information.treatment_response: Treatment response indicated decreased PCR, but increase in bilirubin led to the decision to hold TKI.
Planned initiation, but postponed due to elevated bilirubin levels.
Initial treatment; switched to nolotinib upon detectable PCR.

treatment_timeline.event: Start of treatment with steroids and desatinib.
Switched from desatinib to nolotinib due to detectable PCR.
Planned admission for blinatumomab initiation was postponed.

patient_outcome.final_status: Home, condition stable with continued treatment.
patient_outcome.complications: Mental status changes requiring medication adjustment.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient exhibited mild rib pain and fatigue but maintains ability to walk approximately 1 mile.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported changes in medication improved symptoms; managed overall wellbeing at home.
